aboutSection.heroSubtitle: Reliable medical solutions for hospitals, clinics, and healthcare professionals throughout Latin America.
aboutSection.whoWeAreP1: VitalSupply is a Mexican company based in Torreón, Coahuila, dedicated to distributing medical sensors, cables, and accessories compatible with the leading monitors on the market (Mindray, Philips, GE, Nellcor, Masimo, and more).
aboutSection.whoWeAreP2: We work directly with certified manufacturers in China to offer OEM-quality products at competitive prices, with shipping throughout Mexico and abroad.
aboutSection.pillarQualityText: Products compatible with OEM specifications and international quality standards.
aboutSection.pillarShippingText: We ship throughout Mexico via Estafeta and DHL. International shipping available upon request.
aboutSection.pillarSupportText: Technical support to find the exact part your equipment needs.
aboutSection.ctaText: We serve hospitals, clinics, distributors, and independent professionals. Ask about our wholesale prices.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Professionals
testimonials.review1Text: The quality of the SpO2 sensors is exceptional. They have reduced our replacement costs significantly while maintaining precision.
testimonials.review2Text: Customer service is top-tier. They provided technical support that saved us hours of troubleshooting. Highly recommended.
testimonials.review3Text: Reliable equipment and fast shipping. We've been working with VitalSupply for a year and haven't had a single issue.

aboutPage.title: Contact Us
aboutPage.intro: Do you need a volume quote for your hospital or clinic? Leave your details and a specialized advisor will contact you.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Need a volume quote or help finding a compatible part? We're here for you 24/7.
contactPage.hoursValue: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
contactPage.letsTalkBody: Send us the part number or model you're looking for and we'll get you a quote right away.

wholesalePage.title: Wholesale Program
wholesalePage.subtitle: Special pricing for hospitals, clinics, distributors, and biomedical service companies.
wholesalePage.volumePricingBody: The more you order, the better the price. Tiered discounts for recurring buyers.
wholesalePage.prioritySupplyBody: Stock reservation and priority logistics so you never run out of critical parts.
wholesalePage.dedicatedSupportBody: A specialized advisor to help you find compatible parts for your equipment.
wholesalePage.ctaBody: Tell us about your business and the products you need most. Our team will prepare a custom quote for you.

promosPage.bannerSubtitle: Exclusive discounts on medical supplies for a limited time.

returnsPage.title: Returns & Exchanges
returnsPage.subtitle: Your satisfaction matters. Here's how returns and exchanges work.
returnsPage.section1Body: You may request a return or exchange within 30 days of receiving your order.
returnsPage.section2Body: Items must be returned in their original packaging, unused, and in the same condition you received them. For hygiene and safety reasons, certain single-use or sterile items may not be eligible for return once opened.
returnsPage.section3Body: Return shipping costs are covered by the customer, unless the return is due to our error (wrong or defective item). In that case, we cover the full cost.
returnsPage.section4Body: Contact us via WhatsApp or email with your order number and the reason for the return. We'll guide you through the process and provide the return address.
returnsPage.section5Body: Once we receive and inspect the returned item, your refund will be processed to the original payment method. Please allow a few business days for it to appear, depending on your bank or card issuer.

shippingPage.title: Shipping Policy
shippingPage.subtitle: We ship worldwide. Here's what to expect.
shippingPage.freeShippingTitle: Free Shipping on orders over $150 USD
shippingPage.freeShippingNote: Applies to standard shipping. Orders below $150 have a flat shipping rate calculated at checkout.
shippingPage.section1Body: Many of our products are sourced and prepared to order to guarantee freshness and availability. Orders are typically processed and dispatched within 10 to 20 business days. For items we have in local stock, processing is faster — we'll always confirm your timeline after purchase.
shippingPage.section2Body: We ship across Mexico via national carriers (Estafeta / DHL). Once dispatched, domestic delivery usually takes 2 to 5 business days.
shippingPage.section3Body: We ship worldwide via international couriers (FedEx / DHL). Delivery times vary by destination, typically 5 to 15 business days after dispatch. Import duties, taxes, or customs fees charged by the destination country are the customer's responsibility.
shippingPage.section4Body: Once your order ships, we'll send you a tracking number so you can follow your package every step of the way.
shippingPage.questions: Need your order by a specific date?

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.section1Body: VitalSupply ("we", "us") sells compatible medical sensors, cables, and related accessories. By placing an order through this website, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.
termsPage.section2Body: Our products are aftermarket compatible parts unless explicitly stated as "Original". Brand names and model references are used only to indicate compatibility and remain the property of their respective owners. It is the buyer's responsibility to confirm compatibility with their equipment before purchase. When in doubt, contact us and we'll help you verify.
termsPage.section3Body: All prices are listed in US Dollars (USD). We accept payments through our secure checkout provider. We reserve the right to correct pricing errors and to update prices at any time without notice.
termsPage.section4Body: Placing an order is an offer to purchase. We may accept or decline any order. Many items are prepared to order; estimated processing and delivery times are described in our Shipping Policy.
termsPage.section5Body: Shipping terms are described in our Shipping Policy, and returns are governed by our Returns & Exchanges policy. Import duties and taxes for international orders are the customer's responsibility.
termsPage.section6Body: Products must be installed and used by qualified personnel in accordance with the corresponding equipment's guidelines. To the extent permitted by law, VitalSupply is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the misuse of our products.
termsPage.section7Body1: Questions about these Terms? Reach us at
termsPage.section7Body2: or via WhatsApp at +52 871 782 1161. VitalSupply is based in Torreón, Coahuila, México.
